inputs.question:
Choose the best sentence to fill in the blank.
Many students believe that taking notes means writing down every word the teacher says. In fact, effective notes are usually selective. They record key ideas, examples and questions for later review. ________ When students return to their notes, these marks help them see the structure of the lesson quickly.
A. Different teachers may speak at different speeds.
B. Therefore, useful notes often include headings, arrows and simple symbols.
C. Some students prefer to use digital tools rather than paper notebooks.
D. It is important to keep the classroom quiet during the lesson.
inputs.subject: 英语

solution: 空格前强调“有效笔记是有选择的”，记录重点、例子和问题；空格后出现“these marks”，说明空格处必须提到某种标记。
B 项中的 headings, arrows and simple symbols 正好对应后文 these marks，并且 Therefore 表示承接前文结论。
A 项谈老师语速，不能解释 these marks。
C 项谈工具选择，和后文结构标记关系弱。
D 项谈课堂安静，偏离主题。
outputs.solution_text:
空格前强调“有效笔记是有选择的”，记录重点、例子和问题；空格后出现“these marks”，说明空格处必须提到某种标记。
B 项中的 headings, arrows and simple symbols 正好对应后文 these marks，并且 Therefore 表示承接前文结论。
A 项谈老师语速，不能解释 these marks。
C 项谈工具选择，和后文结构标记关系弱。
D 项谈课堂安静，偏离主题。
